keyword.title: Job Title / Keyword
keyword.description: Job title to search. Example: Delivery Manager, Scrum Master

location.title: City / Location
location.description: Indian city. Example: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai

freshness.title: Job Freshness (days)
freshness.description: 1 = last 24 hours, 3 = last 3 days, 7 = last week

maxPages.title: Max Pages to Crawl
maxPages.description: 1 page = ~20 jobs. Set 2 or 3 for more results.
